title: juniperus communis var. depressa
intro: Juniperus communis var. depressa, also known as creeping juniper, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen shrub native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of creeping juniper include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as a diuretic to help remove excess fluids from the body. Creeping juniper can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
